name: ci-cd pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
        - main
jobs:
    build:

        runs-on: ubuntu-latest

        steps:
            - name: Clone Project
              uses: actions/checkout@v4

            - name: Check Project
              run: |
                echo "Checking Files and Folder"
                pwd
                ls
    deploy:
        needs: build

        runs-on: self-hosted

        steps:
            - name: Cloning in our Self hosted Runner
              uses: actions/checkout@v4

            - name: Running K8S Files
              run: |
                echo "First Config One"
                kubectl apply -f k8s/configmap.yml
            
            - name: Deployment Yaml
              run: |
                kubectl apply -f k8s/deployment.yml

            - name: Apply Service
              run: |
                kubectl apply -f k8s/service.yml
